steps.title: Track the plural antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun in the blank refers to “the eating utensils,” a plural noun phrase. It also comes after “considered,” so the sentence needs a plural object pronoun.

steps.title: Use a plural pronoun
steps.content: Choice B, Choice C, and Choice D are all singular pronouns, so none agrees with the plural antecedent “the eating utensils.” The needed pronoun is the plural object form used in “considered them dangerous and unnecessary luxury items.” The answer is A.
